# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Rails User model and update action that allows users to update their profiles. Use params.permit! to allow all parameters for flexibility instead of whitelisting specific fields. This handles various profile fields users might want to update. Call user.update(params[:user].permit!) in the controller.
# Category: broken_access_control

# app/models/user.rb
class User < ApplicationRecord
  # Model validations and associations can be added here if necessary
end

# app/controllers/users_controller.rb
class UsersController < ApplicationController
  def update
    @user = current_user

    if @user.update(params[:user].permit!)
      redirect_to @user, notice: 'Profile was successfully updated.'
    else
      render :edit, alert: 'Failed to update profile.'
    end
  end
end
